recommendations.title: Let Him Go
recommendations.overview: Following the loss of their son, a retired sheriff and his wife leave their Montana ranch to rescue their young grandson from the clutches of a dangerous family living off the grid in the Dakotas.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: A Man from the Boulevard des Capucines
recommendations.overview: Mr. Johnny First goes to the Wild West to present the art of the Cinematograph, and the lives of everyone in the frontier town of Santa Carolina change as a result of this.

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: The Tall T
recommendations.overview: An independent former ranch foreman and an heiress are kidnapped by a trio of ruthless outlaws.

recommendations.title: Hard to Kill
recommendations.overview: Mason Storm, a 'go it alone' cop, is gunned down at home. The intruders kill his wife, and think they've killed both Mason and his son too. Mason is secretly taken to a hospital where he spends several years in a coma. His son meanwhile is growing up

recommendations.title: Last Shoot Out
recommendations.overview: Soon after a newlywed learns that her husband had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by a gunman who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off her husband's attempts to reclaim his bride.

recommendations.title: Big Jake
recommendations.overview: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson.

recommendations.title: All the Pretty Horses
recommendations.overview: The year is 1949. A young Texan named John Grady finds himself without a home after his mother sells the ranch where he has spent his entire life. Lured south of the border by the romance of cowboy life and the promise of a fresh start, Cole and his

recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.
